prompt: Add a real-time weather widget in the top-right corner displaying local conditions.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by adding a real-time weather widget in the top-right corner of the dashboard interface. The widget should display local weather conditions such as current temperature, a relevant weather icon (e.g., sun, clouds, rain), and potentially a city name, all designed to seamlessly integrate with the existing UI's style and color scheme.
objects: Welcome Back, Lucy Lure header area
Real-time weather widget in the top-right corner
Current temperature in the weather widget
Weather icon in the weather widget
